API: Northwind Capital API v3.5

POST /v1/create-asset  (create_asset)
  asset_ref (string, required)

  agreement_no (string, required)
  monthly_payment (integer, unit=dollars, required)
  commencement_date (date, required)

  asset_id (string, required)

POST /v2/amend-contract  (amend_contract)
  contract_ref (string, required)
  value_date (date, required)
  payment_info (object, required):
    revised_clause (string, optional)
    modification_kind (enum ['rate_change', 'term_extension', 'party_change', 'covenant_update'], required)

POST /v2/post-receipt/execute  (post_receipt)
  receipt_amount (integer, unit=cents, required)
  agreement_no (string, required)
  collection_date (date, required)
  remitter_ref (string, optional)
